title: Alpha Engine Predictions (Slot M contract, v1)
description: Model-slot output contract: written each trading day by the predictor slot to predictor/predictions/{date}.json and predictions/latest.json; consumed by executor (entry gates, vetoes, sizing, optimizer), backtester (veto analysis, IC attribution), dashboard (display). v1 codifies the shape pinned by test_predictions_producer_contract.py (predictor, 2026-06-10 / L4520) plus the always-emitted veto fields, per the consumer-reliance audit of 2026-06-11 (config#638 / M0). predicted_alpha is the 21-day log-domain market-relative alpha estimate under the canonical-alpha framework (clipped to +/-0.15) — NOT the legacy 5-day arithmetic return. Evolution is ADDITIVE-ONLY: new optional fields ride at any time (additionalProperties stays true); removing or renaming a required field is a breaking change requiring a v2 schema + dual-write window.

schema_version.description: Contract version stamp (optional in v1 artifacts for backward compatibility; producers should begin emitting it)

date.description: Trading day (YYYY-MM-DD), strictly backward-looking per DATE_CONVENTIONS.md

timed_out.description: Present only when inference soft-timeout fired; executor treats output as partial

output_distribution_gate.description: Distribution-gate result block (passed/failed_check/reason/metrics); executor hold-book safeguard reads this (null when the producing stage did not run — producer emits the key unconditionally)

level_neutralization.description: Cross-sectional centering observe block (L4487): enabled/applied/reason/mean_removed/direction_diff (null when the producing stage did not run — producer emits the key unconditionally)

predicted_direction.description: Binary directional call (FLAT retired with the post-2026-04-15 binary model; historical artifacts carrying FLAT are grandfathered on READ, not valid against this write-contract)

predicted_alpha.description: 21-day log-domain market-relative alpha estimate (canonical-alpha framework), clipped to +/-0.15

combined_rank.description: Cross-sectional rank (1 = best alpha); null only in degenerate single-name runs

gbm_veto.description: Predictor veto: predicted_alpha < 0 AND bottom-half rank AND confidence >= threshold; executor HARD-BLOCKS ENTER on true — load-bearing safety gate, always emitted

momentum_veto.description: Momentum hard veto (momentum_20d below configured floor); executor entry gate — load-bearing safety gate, always emitted

p_flat.description: Always 0.0 under the binary model; retained for shape stability

predicted_alpha_std.description: Posterior std from BayesianRidge L2 (B.1); executor alpha-uncertainty penalty input; null on pre-BR models

barrier_win_prob.description: Task B meta-label P(upper barrier first); executor sizing multiplier when enabled

research_calibrator_prob.description: P(research signal correct) from the research-score calibrator

stance_loadings.description: Softmax distribution over {momentum, value, quality, catalyst}

catalyst_date.description: Next earnings date (ISO) when available; executor catalyst gate input
